name: The Bunker New Hartford
about: The Bunker is an indoor golf and social lounge that combines TrackMan technology with a full-service sports bar and event space. It offers immersive golf simulator experiences across multiple locations in New York, complete with handcrafted food menus and curated beverage programs. The venue caters to both golfers and non-golfers, providing a social atmosphere for practicing, competing, or hosting private events. Pricing is based on bay time, allowing groups to share costs, with options for hourly bookings and private coaching sessions.
why_golfers_like_it: Professional-grade TrackMan technology used by PGA professionals
Ability to play in a group setting with cost sharing per bay
Combination of golf practice and a full sports bar atmosphere
Access to PGA-certified coaching and custom lesson plans

food_and_drink.notes: Full food menu available at most locations, with scratch-made items and catering options
Full bar service with happy hours and indoor/outdoor seating

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium radar-based launch technology used across all simulator bays

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, players should bring their own golf clubs for use in the simulator bays.

faq.question: Can I bring outside food or drinks?
faq.answer: No, outside food and drinks are not permitted as The Bunker offers a full menu and bar service.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: They recommend 30 minutes per person for 9 holes and one hour per person for 18 holes, so a foursome could play 9 holes in two hours.

faq.question: Is The Bunker kid-friendly?
faq.answer: No, The Bunker is not specifically marketed as kid-friendly and appears to cater more to adults with its sports bar and lounge atmosphere.
